subcodes.first_line: This nation shall not find rectitude at its end, save through what secured its righteousness at the beginning. The Arabs were scattered and dispersed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذه الامه لاتصلح اواخرها الا بما صلح به اوائلها کانت العرب مشته الثمل مفرقه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @Muhammad; Islam, @love and unity
